---
title: "README"
format: gfm
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.qmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  eval = FALSE,
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# taxonAlign

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of `taxonAlign` is to ...

## Installation

You can install the development version of `taxonAlign` from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("traitecoevo/taxonAlign")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

```{r example}
library(taxonAlign)
## basic example code
```


<!-- You'll still need to render `README.qmd` regularly, to keep `README.md` up-to-date.  -->
